code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut current = ""
    mut i = 0
    mut first = true
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i <= n
      mut is_sep = true
      if i < n
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9
            is_sep = true
          else
            is_sep = false
          end
        when None
          is_sep = true
        end
      end
      if is_sep
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          if first
            result = "#{current} #{current}"
            first = false
          else
            result = "#{result} #{current} #{current}"
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        when None
          current = current
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
